features: EFFECTIVE EXFOLIATION SOLUTION: Say goodbye to blemishes and enlarged pores with these powerful Centalla face toner pads korean skincare. The zero pore pads korean skincare works to clear up breakouts and prevent future ones, improve skin texture, pore minimizer

DARK SPOT CORRECTOR & WRINKLE SOLUTION: Potent blend of Alpha-Arbutin, Licorice Root Extract and a Unique Peptide Formula helps reduce dark spots and smooths fine lines. One step away from that coveted 'glass skin' glow with our face cleansing pads korean skincare

SKIN RENEWAL: Premium formula supports reduced redness, blotches, and acne marks. Centella Asiatica and Snail Mucin Extract in this face exfoliating pads help soothe and balance pores for a clearer, more refined skin tone. Our Centella toner pads Perfect for all skin types

DEEP CLEANSING & REDUCES BLACKHEADS: Our Niacinamide exfoliating toner pads korean deeply cleanse pores, removing dirt, oil and makeup. Smooth out skin texture, leaving your face feeling soft, supple. Our zero pore pads provide a convenient and effective solution for daily skincare routines

VERSATILE REJUVENATION SERUM: Use as both a daily toner or intensive face mask. For best results cleanse skin, apply pad evenly in gentle circular motions, wait 40-60 seconds, then apply moisturizer and continue with your skincare routine. Or leave on the exfoliating pads face for up to 15 min as a spot-treating mask
description: Product description 100 PADS ZERO PORE EXFOLIATING CLEANSING PADS - KEY LINGREDIENTS NIACINAMIDE & ALPHA-ARBUTIN: Improves uneven tones and dark spots CENTELLA ASIATICA & PEPTIDE COMPLEX: Targets fine lines and firmer skin SNAIL MUCIN EXTRACT: Soothes and intensely hydrates LICORICE ROOT EXTRACT: Brightens and boosts collagen DIRECTIONS STEP 1: Wetting your face or the area of skin you want to treat STEP 2: Take one Centella Face Exfoliator Pads and use it to gently wipe your entire face and neck or other body part in a circular motion STEP 3: After wiping, leave the Exfoliating Pads Face on your skin for 15 minutes before rinsing it off. Once you've rinsed, simply continue with your regular skincare routine STEP 4: For the best results, use our Exfoliating Toner Pads twice daily. (Once in the morning and once in the evening) SPECIFICATION Product Name: Centella Exfoliating Toner Pads Net Content: 100 Count Benefits: Reduce Acne, Dark Spots, Oil Control, Makeup Removal, Dull Skin, Enlarged Pores, etc Storage Method: In a Cool and Ventilated Place WARM NOTES 1.Keep out of reach of children. 2.Avoid direct contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with cool water. 3.Stop using if redness or irritation occurs, and seek medical assistance if irritation persists. Directions STEP 1: Wet your face or the area of skin you want to treat. STEP 2: Take one Centella Face Exfoliator Pad and use it to gently wipe your entire face and neck or other body part in a circular motion. STEP 3: After wiping, leave the Exfoliating Pad on your skin for 15 minutes before rinsing it off. Once you've rinsed, simply continue with your regular skincare routine. STEP 4: For the best results, use our Exfoliating Toner Pads twice daily. (Once in the morning and once in the evening). Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
